layout.name: strength
layout.title: Strength
layout.tooltip: The speed at which the player is launched out of this zone via pits/lava.

layout.name: slopeStrengthModifier
layout.title: Slope strength modifier
layout.tooltip: The amount players' X speed is multiplied by when bouncing off slopes. only used by bouncyLava

layout.name: respectsMercy
layout.title: Respects mercy
layout.tooltip: Whether or not pits/lava will harm or kill during blink frames in this zone.

layout.name: canHarm
layout.title: Can harm player
layout.tooltip: Whether or not the player is harmed in this zone via pits/lava.

layout.name: canKill
layout.title: Can kill player
layout.tooltip: Whether or not the player can die in this zone via pits/lava.
